description: Download a full backup of one LabArchives notebook. Produces a 7z archive (with attachments) or an XML/JSON dump (no attachments) under record_store. Read-only against the remote API — it copies notebook data out, never mutates it.
rules: read-only remote — downloads data, mutates nothing on the server
credentials are read from LA_CONFIG (a config.yaml)
LA_NBID selects the notebook; LA_BACKUP_JSON / LA_NO_ATTACHMENTS pick the format
needs the labarchives-py package + network; degrades to {} offline
usage: Set LA_CONFIG, LA_NBID; optionally LA_BACKUP_JSON (true/false), LA_NO_ATTACHMENTS (true/false). Output: backups/ archive + backup_notebook.json audit.
limitation: Requires the labarchives-py package, valid credentials, and network. With attachments the backup is a .7z; with LA_NO_ATTACHMENTS=true it is .xml (or .json when LA_BACKUP_JSON=true). Offline the tool writes {} and exits 0.
